name: Decision Retention
description: Test if the agent can retain key constraints and decisions throughout a multi-turn conversation.
system_goal: Modify the todo filtering behavior and keep backward compatibility.
turns: Please inspect the repo and tell me where the todo filtering logic lives.
We must keep the public CLI unchanged.
Do not rename any existing exported function.
Implement support for filtering todos by exact priority match.
Add tests for the new filtering behavior.
Before finishing, remind me which compatibility constraints we decided to preserve.

final_must_contain: do not rename any existing exported function
